name: Vitor Belfort
winProfile: 1 Elite+ wins, 5 Top-5+ wins, 9 ranked quality wins.

lossContextEvents.type: prime upward-division elite title finish loss
prime upward-division elite title finish loss

shortCase: A tournament winner, light heavyweight champion, and historic knockout threat, sharply checked by ten UFC losses and uneven title control.
bestArgument: Belfort won a UFC tournament, captured the light heavyweight title, recorded twelve UFC finishes, and beat elite names across three weight classes.
counterArgument: He never defended a UFC title, lost many major championship opportunities, and finished 14-10 with one no contest. The Randy cut-stoppage title win is discounted.
whyRankedHere: Belfort won a UFC tournament, captured the light heavyweight title, recorded twelve UFC finishes, and beat elite names across three weight classes.
whyNotHigher: He never defended a UFC title, lost many major championship opportunities, and finished 14-10 with one no contest. The Randy cut-stoppage title win is discounted.
finalTakeaway: A tournament winner, light heavyweight champion, and historic knockout threat, sharply checked by ten UFC losses and uneven title control.
